Static HTML sample

This document contains only static markup and inline CSS. Both engines (Gotenberg/Chromium and Aspose.Words) should render it near-identically: it is the control sample of the engine comparison.

EngineJavaScriptExpected result
Gotenbergexecutedfull render
Aspose.Wordsnonefull render (static content)

No external resources are referenced, so the BR-4 deny policy has nothing to do here.
